assertions.reason: Repeated full-stack reruns on current local revision are blocked at Playwright startup by occupied mission ports, preventing validation of passing-stack repeatability in this session.
evidence: /tmp/ns-gate-evidence/stack-summary.txt: 3 reruns show lint/vitest/pytest exitCode=0 and playwright exitCode=1 each run
lsof -nP -iTCP:3100 -sTCP:LISTEN and lsof -nP -iTCP:3101 -sTCP:LISTEN showed active listeners before reruns

frictions: Playwright config uses webServer reuseExistingServer:false, so shared mission port occupancy (3100/3101) immediately blocks local ci:playwright reruns in multi-worker environments.
